column5: 1. My motivation is lower when I am fatigued. (Disagree=1, Agree=7)

column9: 5. Fatigue causes frequent problems for me. (Disagree=1, Agree=7)
column10: 6. My fatigue prevents sustained physical functioning. (Disagree=1, Agree=7)
column11: 7. Fatigue interferes with carrying out certain duties and responsibilities. (Disagree=1, Agree=7)
column12: 8. Fatigue is among my three most disabling symptoms. (Disagree=1, Agree=7)
column13: 9. Fatigue interferes with my work, family, or social life. (Disagree=1, Agree=7)
